articles.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
articles.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.

articles.title: ChatGPT for operations teams
articles.summary: Learn how operations teams use ChatGPT to streamline workflows, improve coordination, standardize processes, and drive faster execution.

articles.title: Applications of AI at OpenAI
articles.summary: Explore how OpenAI products like ChatGPT, Codex, and APIs bring AI into real-world use for work, development, and everyday tasks.

articles.title: ChatGPT for finance teams
articles.summary: Learn how finance teams use ChatGPT to streamline reporting, analyze data, improve forecasts, and communicate insights more clearly.

articles.title: Brainstorming with ChatGPT
articles.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT to brainstorm ideas, organize thinking, and turn rough concepts into structured, actionable plans.

articles.title: Our response to the Axios developer tool compromise
articles.summary: OpenAI responds to the Axios supply chain attack by rotating macOS code signing certificates, updating apps, and confirming no user data was compromised.
